ddls:
CREATE TABLE "problems" (
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each problem */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the problem */,
  "problem_description" TEXT /* Description of the numerical problem */,
  "problem_name" TEXT /* User-friendly name for the problem */,
  "problem_type" TEXT /* Type of problem (e.g., root-finding, optimization) */,
  "constraints" TEXT /* Constraints or conditions for the problem */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Algorithm-specific parameters */,
  "initial_guess_1" REAL /* First initial guess for the problem */,
  "initial_guess_2" REAL /* Second initial guess for the problem */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used to solve the problem */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the problem was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the problem was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problems_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problems_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, engineer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* User's access level (e.g., admin, user, guest) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm (e.g., Gradient Descent, Newton-Raphson) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "algorithm_type" TEXT /* Type of algorithm (e.g., gradient-based, evolutionary) */,
  "complexity" TEXT /* Complexity of the algorithm */,
  "parallelizable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the algorithm can be run in parallel */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iterations" (
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each iteration */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem being solved */,
  "iteration_number" INTEGER /* The number of the iteration */,
  "solution_value" REAL /* The solution value at this iteration */,
  "fail_or_success" TEXT /* Whether the iteration was a success or a failure */,
  "iteration_time" REAL /* Duration of the iteration */,
  "convergence_rate" REAL /* Rate of convergence for the iteration */,
  "error_margin" REAL /* Error margin for the solution at this iteration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the iteration was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iterations_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem */,
  "number_of_iterations" INTEGER /* Total number of iterations taken */,
  "final_solution" REAL /* Final solution value */,
  "success" TEXT /* Whether the problem was successfully solved */,
  "total_time" REAL /* Total time taken to solve the problem */,
  "convergence_rate" REAL /* Overall convergence rate for the problem */,
  "error_margin" REAL /* Final error margin for the solution */,
  "algorithm_performance" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id")
)
